log4j:log4j.reason: Log4j 1.x reached EOL 2015. Multiple unpatched CVEs.

commons-logging:commons-logging.reason: Apache Commons Logging is largely superseded by SLF4J. Classloader leak issues.

commons-io:commons-io.reason: The pre-2.x coordinate is deprecated; use the org.apache.commons groupId.

javax.servlet:servlet-api.reason: javax.* namespace moved to jakarta.* in Jakarta EE 9+.

javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api.reason: Removed from the JDK in Java 11; use Jakarta XML Binding.

org.codehaus.jackson:jackson-core-asl.reason: Jackson 1.x is EOL since 2014. Has known unpatched CVEs.

org.codehaus.jackson:jackson-mapper-asl.reason: Jackson 1.x is EOL. Multiple deserialization CVEs.

xml-apis:xml-apis.reason: XML APIs are bundled with the JDK.

org.json:json.reason: Performance issues, restrictive license. Prefer Jackson.

joda-time:joda-time.reason: Joda-Time author recommends java.time on JDK 8+.

javax.mail:mail.reason: javax.mail is the old coordinate; moved to Jakarta Mail.

javax.activation:activation.reason: javax.* → jakarta.* migration; also removed from JDK in 11.

struts:struts.replacement: (framework rewrite recommended; Struts 1.x is EOL with critical CVEs)

org.apache.struts:struts2-core.replacement: (audit version: many critical RCEs in Struts 2.x)
org.apache.struts:struts2-core.reason: Many versions of Struts 2 have critical RCE CVEs (CVE-2017-5638 etc). Verify version is patched.

axis:axis.reason: Apache Axis 1.x is EOL since 2006. Apache CXF is the modern alternative.

net.sf.ehcache:ehcache.reason: Ehcache 2.x is in maintenance only; use Ehcache 3.x.

c3p0:c3p0.reason: c3p0 maintained but HikariCP is the recommended modern connection pool.

commons-httpclient:commons-httpclient.reason: Apache Commons HttpClient 3.x is EOL since 2011.

org.apache.httpcomponents:httpclient.reason: HttpClient 4.x in maintenance; HttpClient 5.x is the active line.

junit:junit.reason: JUnit 4 is in maintenance; JUnit 5 is the modern line.

org.hamcrest:hamcrest-all.reason: hamcrest-all is deprecated; use the single 'hamcrest' artifact.
